subject:
Incomplete cross-correlation map when template matching on
 tomograms
body:
Dear Dimitry, Dear all,

I have been noticing that when I run template matching jobs on tomograms, I 
get cross correlation map for only part of the entire volume of the 
tomogram. See attached image to see what I mean. I cannot seem to figure 
out why this is. The dimensions of the X-corr map is the same as the 
tomogram; just the region with actual cross-correlation data seems to be 
just a part of the tomogram.

What I did so far:
Alignments in IMOD/eTOMO (also did tomogram positioning!)
Tomogram reconstruction in Warp (8 fold binning)
Manually picked particles using cube
Reconstructed the template model in Relion using relion_reconstruct
Used the template in Warp for template matching job.

I would appreciate any input as to why this may be happening.
[image: Screenshot 2021-12-01 at 11.13.48.png] 
Area of the X-corr map with actual data compared to map dimensions

[image: Screenshot 2021-12-01 at 11.16.56.png] 
Area of X-corr map with data compared to the actual tomogram

Thanks,
Arjun
